name: proxyparser
description: Bun monorepo for proxy subscription parsing, rule patching, and a small operations dashboard.
author: Paperside

scripts.dev: sh -c 'export PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH"; exec concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "bun run --cwd backend dev" "bun run --cwd frontend dev"'
scripts.start: sh -c 'export PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH"; exec concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "bun run --cwd backend start" "bun run --cwd frontend start"'
scripts.build: sh -c 'export PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH"; bun run --cwd backend typecheck && bun run --cwd frontend build'
scripts.typecheck: sh -c 'export PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH"; bun run --cwd backend typecheck && bun run --cwd frontend typecheck'
scripts.dev:backend: sh -c 'export PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH"; exec bun run --cwd backend dev'
scripts.dev:frontend: sh -c 'export PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH"; exec bun run --cwd frontend dev'
scripts.start:backend: sh -c 'export PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH"; exec bun run --cwd backend start'
scripts.start:frontend: sh -c 'export PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH"; exec bun run --cwd frontend start'
